Container.Name: Weatherby
Container.Overview: Weatherby — A retro 1990s-style global weather command centre. Features a 3D interactive globe, animated radar, real-time conditions, 10-day forecasts, severe weather alerts, and more. Mobile-first design. Powered by Open-Meteo and RainViewer APIs.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Weatherby web interface.

Config.Name: Cache Interval
Config.Description: How long to cache weather data (seconds). Default: 600 (10 minutes).

Config.Name: Default Location
Config.Description: Default location as lat,lon. Example: 51.5074,-0.1278 for London.

Config.Name: Open-Meteo Endpoint
Config.Description: Open-Meteo API endpoint. Change only if using a self-hosted instance.

Config.Name: RainViewer API URL
Config.Description: RainViewer API endpoint for radar tiles.

Config.Name: Satellite Source
Config.Description: Preferred satellite imagery source. Options: GOES-EAST, GOES-WEST, HIMAWARI, METEOSAT.
